message:
fix(server): add spawn_blocking timeout + enrich /health with DB identity

spawn_blocking timeout (#76): Wraps the dispatch spawn_blocking call with
a hard timeout (request_timeout_secs + 5s). If SQLite busy_timeout or
other blocking operations exceed the budget, the caller gets a proper MCP
InternalError instead of hanging indefinitely. Health endpoints remain
unaffected since they bypass the dispatch path.

Health enrichment (#77): The /health readiness response now includes
database_path (basename only), project_count, message_count, and version.
Adds log_active_database() at all startup paths (stdio, HTTP, TUI) that
emits a prominent log line showing the active DB path and storage root.
Warns when DB has zero messages but the archive root contains data
directories (likely a recreation without restore). Also adds Linux
/proc/locks-based lock holder identification in startup_checks.

Closes #76, closes #77

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
